item.name: Whale Horn
item.description: The tones of this hefty horn echo through sky and sea, summoning a whale that is conveniently bound to neither.

mount.name: Indigo Whale
mount.action: Summon forth a massive whale straight from the Indigo Deep. If only you could do this with fish as well.
mount.description: Pods of these massive wavekin are believed to traverse the Indigo Deep for thousands of malms in pursuit of food. Why they would choose to limit themselves to the confines of the sea despite possessing the capacity for aether-assisted flight is a mystery scholars have pondered for centuries.
mount.tooltip:
Why, what a whale you've
whisked out of the whitecaps!
- Wawalago
